footer.tagline: Private access and evidence-backed intelligence for exceptional collector assets.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Discover exceptional collector assets curated for the discerning eye.
explore.noResults: No objects found in this category.
explore.heroSubtitle: Evidence-backed intelligence, private access, and curated discovery for watches, jewelry, handbags, fine art, and cultural heritage.

artifact.passportDescription: A comprehensive digital dossier documenting provenance, custody chain, condition reports, and expert analysis.

luxury.hubSubtitle: Curated profiles of exceptional watches, jewelry, handbags, design objects, and cultural heritage.
luxury.watchesDesc: Independent makers, rare references, and important complications from the 19th century to present day.
luxury.jewelryDesc: Important jewels from renowned maisons and independent artisans, with full stone documentation.
luxury.handbagsDesc: Rare and collectible handbags with verified provenance, original accessories, and condition documentation.
luxury.designDesc: Collectible design from iconic 20th and 21st century designers and studios.
luxury.culturalDesc: Objects of cultural significance with full provenance, legal review, and heritage documentation.

library.title: Noble Library
library.subtitle: Heritage Atlas, Museum Index, Maison Heritage, Collector Guides, and Glossary.
library.heritageAtlasDesc: Explore the cultural and geographical context of exceptional crafts and collecting traditions.
library.museumsDesc: A curated directory of museums and cultural institutions of note.
library.maisonHeritageDesc: The history and legacy of prestigious maisons and their master craftspeople.
library.guidesDesc: Practical guides for collectors at every level of experience.
library.glossaryDesc: Terms, definitions, and the collector asset taxonomy.
library.archiveDesc: Historical records, notable sales, and market intelligence.

archive.title: Market Archive
archive.subtitle: Historical records, notable sales, and market intelligence for collector assets.

glossary.title: Glossary & Taxonomy
glossary.subtitle: Terms and definitions used across the Noble Collectors platform.

account.subtitle: Your personal overview and quick actions.

documents.subtitle: Your heritage passports, condition reports, and certificates.

salon.subtitle: An exclusive community of discerning collectors. Access private rooms, share insights, and discover exceptional objects.
salon.accessDescription: This room requires an access invitation. Please contact the room host.

settings.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently removed.

introductions.title: Noble Introductions Circle
introductions.subtitle: Connect with fellow collectors through trusted, vetted introductions.
introductions.step1Desc: Browse our network of collectors, estates, and institutions and request a trusted introduction.
introductions.step2Desc: Our concierge team vets both sides to ensure a secure and fruitful connection.
introductions.step3Desc: Meet virtually or in person through our curated introduction process.
introductions.privacy: Your privacy is protected. Contact details are only shared with mutual consent.
introductions.benefitAccess: Access to private collections not listed publicly
introductions.benefitNetwork: Network with leading collectors and institutions
introductions.benefitTrust: Every introduction is vetted by Noble Concierge

growth.leadCaptureDesc: Subscribe to receive market insights, auction previews, and collecting guides.
growth.consentBanner: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing you agree to our Cookie Policy.
growth.thankYou: Thank you! We'll be in touch.
